required_skills: Advanced Microsoft Excel and Data Modeling
responsibilities: Analyze transportation costs, carrier performance, and freight spend data to identify opportunities for logistics cost reduction initiatives.
Develop logistics dashboards that track shipment performance, delivery accuracy, transportation efficiency, and customer service metrics.
Evaluate distribution network performance using operational data to improve routing efficiency and reduce transit times.
Conduct freight and carrier benchmarking analyses to support transportation procurement and contract negotiation decisions.
Collaborate with warehouse, procurement, and transportation teams to improve material flow and logistics execution processes.
Build predictive models to forecast shipment volumes, transportation demand, and capacity requirements across logistics networks.
Investigate shipment delays, delivery failures, and logistics bottlenecks to recommend data-driven corrective actions.
Prepare detailed logistics performance reports and present operational insights to supply chain leadership and business stakeholders.
